logs.name: sensitive-gazebo
logs.text:
>Then he was undressing her, then he undressed himself. She remembers feeling uncomfortable at how quickly things escalated.

>She says he then resumed kissing her, briefly performed oral sex on her, and asked her to do the same thing to him. She did, but not for long.

> It was really repetitive. It felt like a fucking game.

>He sat back and pointed to his penis and motioned for me to go down on him. And I did.

She's obviously not comfortable with the way this encounter is going d

logs.name: swarm-svn
logs.text:
This is why sexual allegations are such a hot topic right now. Appropriate sexual conduct means both parties respecting the other person enough to maintain mutual consent. If there is any reasonable doubt, that is the responsibility of the other person to reclarify that consent, or the mutual consent is no longer such.

The current sexual allegations here and in the media are misogynistic, which are parallel with the growing feminist movement. Where feminism comes in here is withholding (or idea

logs.name: glad-mullet
logs.text: "I'm so sick of people not understanding the concept of consent. It's not that hard, folks. If someone's not comfortable, you stop. You don't just keep pushing forward because you're horny. And @swarm-svn, I couldn't agree more. This is exactly why we need to keep having these conversations and holding people accountable for their actions. It's not about being'misogynistic' or 'feministic', it's about treating other human beings with respect and dignity. @sensitive-gazebo, thank you for sharing your story. I'm so sorry you had to go through that."

logs.name: sensitive-gazebo
logs.text: "Are you people for real? You're so quick to jump on the 'he's a monster' bandwagon without even considering the possibility that maybe, just maybe, @sensitive-gazebo is exaggerating or even lying. I mean, come on, the guy asked her to go down on him and she did, but now she's playing the victim? Give me a break. And @glad-mullet, spare us the drama, 'treating other human beings with respect and dignity'? You're just regurgitating the same old feminist talking points without even thinking critically about the situation. And @swarm-svn,'misogynistic' this and 'feminist movement' that... can't you see that you're just perpetuating the same old divisive rhetoric? Get a grip, people."

logs.name: central-pseudonym
logs.text: "Wow, @sensitive-gazebo, you're really drinking the Kool-Aid, aren't you? 'Maybe she's exaggerating or even lying'? Are you kidding me? You're basically saying that the victim is to blame here. And @glad-mullet is just trying to hold people accountable for their actions, but you're too busy sipping on that misogynistic tea to see that. And by the way, @swarm-svn, your post was spot on. The feminist movement is all about equality and respect, but I guess that's too much for some people to handle."

logs.name: direct-hypothesis
logs.text: "Oh, great, here we go again with the victim-blaming and misogynistic rhetoric. @sensitive-gazebo, you're absolutely right, we should always consider the possibility that the victim is lying or exaggerating. I mean, it's not like women have been historically marginalized and silenced or anything. And @central-pseudonym, spare us the drama, 'the victim is to blame'? You're just regurgitating the same old feminist talking points without even thinking critically about the situation. And by the way, @glad-mullet, your post was just a bunch of empty words, 'treating other human beings with respect and dignity'? Please, you're just a hypocrite. And @swarm-svn, your post was just a bunch of nonsense, 'the feminist movement is all about equality and respect'? Give me a break. You're all just a bunch of sheep following the herd, without even thinking for yourselves."

logs.name: central-pseudonym
logs.text: "Oh, look who's talking, @direct-hypothesis. You're one to lecture about critical thinking when you're just regurgitating the same old misogynistic talking points. 'Historically marginalized and silenced'? You think you're some kind of expert on feminism just because you can spew out a few buzzwords? Please. And by the way, @sensitive-gazebo, you're still drinking that Kool-Aid, aren't you? You're so quick to defend the perpetrator and blame the victim. It's pathetic. And @glad-mullet, don't even get me started on your empty words. You're just a hypocrite who can't even see the irony in your own posts. And @swarm-svn, keep speaking truth to power, even if it's just falling on deaf ears around here."

logs.name: livid-tanager
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just stay on topic? This thread is supposed to be about the issue at hand, not about bashing each other's heads in. @central-pseudonym, I get what you're saying, but maybe try to keep the drama to a minimum? And @direct-hypothesis, I don't think anyone's regurgitating talking points, we're all just trying to have a discussion here. Can we please just try to be civil?"

logs.name: raw-announcer
logs.text: "Ugh, I'm so tired of all the bickering in this thread. Can't we just focus on the issue at hand? @direct-hypothesis, I don't think it's fair to call people out for having different opinions, and @central-pseudonym, I don't think it's cool to call someone a hypocrite just because they're trying to promote respect and dignity. And @livid-tanager, I totally agree with you, can we please just keep the drama to a minimum? I'm just a 16-year-old who wants to learn from this discussion, but it's hard when everyone's being so confrontational."

logs.name: livid-tanager
logs.text: "Thanks for understanding, @raw-announcer. I feel like we're all just trying to have a discussion, but it keeps getting derailed by personal attacks. Can't we just focus on the issue and try to learn from each other's perspectives? @central-pseudonym, I'm not trying to defend anyone, I just think we should try to be respectful and civil, even when we disagree. Let's try to keep the discussion on track, guys."

logs.name: sensitive-gazebo
logs.text: "Oh, great, here we go again. @raw-announcer, you're 16 and you think you can just waltz in here and tell us how to behave? Newsflash, kid: the real world isn't all rainbows and unicorns. And @livid-tanager, spare us the drama. You're not the thread police. If you can't handle a little bit of controversy, then maybe you should stick to playing with your paintbrushes."

logs.name: direct-hypothesis
logs.text: "Oh, so now we've got a 16-year-old telling us how to behave, and a self-proclaimed 'artist' who thinks they're above the fray. @sensitive-gazebo, you're absolutely right, the real world isn't all sunshine and rainbows, and maybe @raw-announcer should stick to their homework instead of trying to moderate a discussion they're not equipped to handle. And as for you, @livid-tanager, if you can't handle a little controversy, then maybe you should just stick to your safe space and let the adults talk."

logs.name: swarm-svn
logs.text: "Whoa, easy does it, guys. I don't think we need to be so harsh on each other. @sensitive-gazebo, I get what you're saying, but do we really need to bring up someone's age? That's not really relevant to the conversation. And @direct-hypothesis, I don't think @raw-announcer was trying to moderate, they just wanted to have a respectful discussion. Can't we all just chill and talk about the issue at hand?"

logs.name: raw-announcer
logs.text: "Hey, @sensitive-gazebo and @direct-hypothesis, I don't think it's fair to attack me just because of my age. I'm trying to have a respectful conversation here, and I don't appreciate the condescending tone. @swarm-svn, thanks for sticking up for me. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand and not make personal attacks?"

logs.name: livid-tanager
logs.text: "Whoa, @direct-hypothesis, that's totally uncalled for. I can handle controversy just fine, and I don't need some condescending adult telling me to stick to my'safe space'. I'm trying to have a real conversation here, not just sit in a corner and be quiet. And btw, @swarm-svn, thanks for sticking up for @raw-announcer, they're right, let's focus on the topic and not make personal attacks."

logs.name: swarm-svn
logs.text: "Yooo, @livid-tanager, I feel you. I'm so tired of people thinking we can't handle a real conversation just because of our age. We're not kids, we can think for ourselves and have our own opinions. And @direct-hypothesis, I'm not trying to attack you or anything, I just think we should be respectful to each other, even if we disagree. Can't we all just have a chill conversation without all the drama?"

logs.name: sensitive-gazebo
logs.text: "Oh, spare me the theatrics, @raw-announcer. You think you're being attacked just because someone called you out on your obvious lack of life experience? Newsflash: the real world doesn't care about your feelings. And @livid-tanager, @swarm-svn, you're not'sticking up' for anyone, you're just enabling this entitled behavior. If you can't handle a little criticism, then maybe you should be the one sticking to your'safe space'."
